meaning: adj.提供情报的,增长见闻的,鼓舞的
examples: She was given the unenviable task of informing the losers.
An alert should appear, informing you to first select an item from the grid.
It's good because you're preparing other people. You're informing them that you're going to be moving forward.
Keep your contact information up to date, informing stores whenever you change your number.
Mr Chaunt said he had written to Mr Cameron informing him of the error.
